title: ConsumerComplaint
description: A consumer complaint filed with DCWP against a business — the citizen-facing transaction of the Department. Canonical schema reconciling the 'DCWP Consumer Complaints' dataset (nre2-6m2s, 33 columns). This schema serves BOTH the read surface (published complaint records) AND the net-new write surface: FILING a complaint has no public API today — it goes through 311 or a DCWP web form. This is the domain's net-new WRITE object.

recordId.description: 'Record ID' — server-assigned complaint id. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

srNumber311.description: '311 SR Number' — linked 311 service request. Assigned on intake.

complaintCode.description: 'Complaint Code' — nature of the complaint (e.g. overcharge, false advertising, licensing).

description.description: Free-text description of the consumer's complaint.

referredTo.description: 'Referred To' — agency the complaint was routed to.

contact.description: Complainant contact details (not published to Open Data).
